description_long: This is a shallow, round ceramic bowl with a wide opening and two small, rounded handles on opposite sides. The exterior is a warm, earthy brown, while the interior features a cream-colored base adorned with a repeating pattern of dark, stylized motifs, possibly floral or abstract, encircling the inner wall. The rim is slightly raised and appears to have a darker, textured finish, providing a subtle contrast to the smoother body. The handles are ribbed and integrated into the bowl's form, offering both decorative and functional value. The bowl's surface shows a matte, slightly rough finish, typical of hand-crafted pottery. There are no visible contents inside, and the bowl appears to be in good condition with no major chips or cracks.
description: A shallow, round ceramic bowl with two small ribbed handles and a cream interior decorated with dark, repeating motifs. The exterior is earthy brown with a matte, slightly rough finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights one of the ribbed handles and the decorative interior pattern, showing the bowl's shallow depth and wide opening.
description_view_1: This angle displays both handles, emphasizing the bowl's symmetry and the full extent of the interior motif around the rim.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side shows the opposite handle and the continuous decorative pattern inside the bowl.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the second handle and the bowl's overall round shape, with the interior motif visible along the rim.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Dark, repeating abstract or floral motifs encircle the interior wall, with a patterned border near the rim.
